from typing import Iterator, Any


def iter_events(log_path: str) -> Iterator:
    with open(log_path) as f:
        for line in f:
            parts = line.strip().split("\t")
            if parts[0] == "ERROR":
                yield {"level": "error", "message": parts[1], "code": int(parts[2])}
            elif parts[0] == "METRIC":
                yield {"name": parts[1], "value": float(parts[2])}
            elif parts[0] == "TRACE":
                yield parts[1]
            else:
                yield None


def iterate_results(query_result) -> Iterator[Any]:
    for row in query_result:
        if row.type == "scalar":
            yield row.value
        elif row.type == "record":
            yield {"id": row.id, "name": row.name, "tags": row.tags}
        elif row.type == "aggregate":
            yield (row.count, row.sum, row.avg)
